name: KakaoTalk Messaging and KakaoWork API
what_it_does: South Korea's dominant messaging and social platform REST API — enabling developers to integrate KakaoTalk login (Kakao Login), send messages via Kakao Talk channel (Kakao API Message), build chatbots (Kakao i Open Builder), access social features, and integrate with Kakao Pay and Kakao Map, serving Korea's 47M+ active users (95%+ smartphone penetration in Korea).
use_cases: Implementing Kakao Login via Kakao OAuth2 API for Korean market user authentication
Sending business notifications via Kakao Talk channel API for Korean customer engagement
Building KakaoTalk chatbots via Kakao i Open Builder for Korean customer service automation
Integrating Kakao Pay via API for Korean e-commerce payment flows
Accessing Korean social graph via Kakao API for Korean market user engagement features
not_for: Non-Korean markets (KakaoTalk is Korea-specific — use WhatsApp or WeChat for other regions)
Enterprise team messaging (use KakaoWork API separately for business messaging)
Developers outside Korea without Korean app store presence
best_when: A developer targeting the Korean market needs social login, messaging notifications, or chatbot capabilities through Korea's dominant messaging platform with 95%+ user penetration.
avoid_when: Your target market is outside South Korea or you need global messaging coverage — KakaoTalk is Korea-specific.

auth.notes: OAuth2 authorization code flow for user-delegated access (Kakao Login). App key (REST API key) for server-to-server. Admin key for management API (dangerous — full access). Access token in Authorization: Bearer header or KakaoAK header for admin. OAuth2 scopes: profile, account_email, gender, age_range, birthday, talk_message, etc. Refresh token support. 30-minute access token, 60-day refresh token. KakaoWork uses separate auth system.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: Kakao Login, basic API calls (10,000/day); Message API: free with limits
pricing.paid_tiers: Kakao Talk Channel messaging: pay per message for business notifications (₩30-70/message)
pricing.notes: Kakao Corp. (Seongnam, South Korea). KOSPI listed. Market cap ₩25T+. KakaoTalk: 47M Korean users (95% penetration). Kakao ecosystem: KakaoTalk, KakaoMap, KakaoPay, KakaoMobility, KakaoBank, Kakao Entertainment. KakaoWork: enterprise team messaging (Teams/Slack competitor for Korean companies). Kakao i: AI platform including chatbot builder. Korean documentation is primary — English docs lag behind. App registration required at developers.kakao.com. Test accounts needed for development. REST API key for server, JavaScript key for web, Native App Key for mobile.

performance.rate_limits: 10,000 requests/day for free; paid plans have higher limits

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: OAuth2 with scopes. Korean documentation primary. Korea-only platform. PIPA compliance. Three API key types (REST, JS, Native, Admin). Admin key is dangerous (never expose). 47M Korean users. 10K req/day free.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: User reads idempotent by user ID. Message sending not idempotent — retry may duplicate. OAuth tokens: read operations idempotent. Channel message delivery at-least-once.
known_agent_gotchas: NEVER use Admin key in client-side code — full account access with no scope restrictions
Three API key types: REST API Key (server), JavaScript Key (web), Native App Key (mobile) — use correct one
Korean documentation is primary — English docs may be incomplete or outdated
Domain verification required for production apps at developers.kakao.com
PIPA compliance required for handling Korean user data (Personal Information Protection Act)
KakaoWork is a SEPARATE product with different API — enterprise messaging, not consumer KakaoTalk

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. OAuth2 with granular scopes. PIPA compliance (Korean data protection law). Admin key is dangerous (full access — never expose). Korea data residency. Social login handles PII (profile, email, gender, age). Kakao Corp listed on KOSPI — public company accountability. Three key types for different client environments — security isolation. Refresh token 60-day expiry.
